name: Cornish Hen with Peaches
recipeInstructions:
1. Split the hens, rinse and pat dry.
2. In a 7 x 11 baking dish, combine the rice mix with water and butter according to the amount on the package.
3. Cook for about 1 minute on high heat.
4. Stir in the rice, cover, and cook for an additional 2 minutes.
5. Arrange hen halves, skin side down, on top of the rice, cover, and cook on high heat for 10 minutes, turning often.
6. Drain peaches, reserving 2 tablespoons juice.
7. In a small bowl, combine butter, honey, dry mustard, and curry powder. Cook uncovered until bubbly, about 45 seconds.
8. Lift out hen halves, stir rice well, and return to the dish with skin sides up.
9. Brush skin well with honey mixture. Cook for an additional 10 minutes.
10. Arrange peach halves around hens, brush with honey mixture, and cook for an additional 45 seconds.
11. Sprinkle with paprika. Stand covered for 5 minutes. Adjust cooking time as needed for one hen.
